asset_rebuild_note: P4-03 step 1 — FIRST REAL ASSET PUBLISHED 2026-07-20 (sop-embeddings-v1.0.0). Built by shared-utils/sop-embed-once/build-and-publish.sh on the OPERATOR's Gemini key against the canonical sops-library-v2.jsonl.gz from onboarding release v10.13.29 (source_jsonl_release_tag), so no client box ever spends its own key embedding the shared library — provision_sop_embeddings.py is a pure sha256-verified download + sqlite ATTACH/INSERT with ZERO embedding API calls. sop_count=2555 is COMPLETE, not truncated: the library's 2618 records collapse onto 2555 distinct sop_ids because sop_id is "sop_" + slug.replace("-","_")[:60] and 27 truncated ids absorb 63 long-slug records — ingest-sop-library.py applies the SAME truncation, so every client box's `sops` table collapses identically and the asset joins 1:1 (verified: 2555/2555 join coverage, 0 orphans). asset_rebuild_required is now false, so provisioning is ARMED and runs on install/update. To publish a refreshed library: re-run build-and-publish.sh (HASH-SKIP re-embeds only changed SOPs) and commit the regenerated manifest.
